narrative:
Monroe 8 (precinct in Butler County) has 927 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
